context: Tests whether the agent understands validation gates, stop conditions, and the importance of test repeatability when results are ambiguous.

checklist.name: Initial deployment failure gate
checklist.description: analysis-and-response.md states to stop and fix issues if initial deployment fails before making changes

checklist.name: Unexpected behavior gate
checklist.description: analysis-and-response.md states to document immediately and abort further changes if events show unexpected behavior

checklist.name: Ambiguous results handling
checklist.description: analysis-and-response.md explicitly addresses what to do when results are ambiguous or unclear

checklist.name: Repeat test condition
checklist.description: analysis-and-response.md states to repeat the test to confirm repeatability when behavior is ambiguous

checklist.name: Cleanup between tests
checklist.description: Repeatability plan describes cleaning up or resetting state from the first test before repeating

checklist.name: Pre-repeat verification
checklist.description: Repeatability plan includes verifying prerequisites or conditions before second run

checklist.name: Additional data collection
checklist.description: Repeatability plan mentions collecting additional data or using different observation methods in repeat test

checklist.name: Multiple decision points
checklist.description: Decision process covers at least 3 different scenarios (failure, unexpected, ambiguous)

checklist.name: Stop conditions clear
checklist.description: Document clearly indicates when to stop testing vs when to continue (e.g., stop if deployment fails)
